---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the consistency or logic of the repository.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the Bug
Provide a clear and concise description of the inconsistency, broken link, or logic error in the repository.

### Canonical File Location
Identify the file and line number where the issue occurs:
- File: `[e.g., WORKFLOW.md]`
- Line: `[e.g., L45]`

### Verification Steps
How can this issue be reproduced?
1. Open file ...
2. Observe mismatch between ...

### Proposed Correction
Describe the exact text or rule modification needed to resolve the issue.
